description: Human roles and occupations in sci-fi settings.
characters: Astronaut
A space-trained explorer who ventures beyond the atmosphere.
Scientist
A hypothesis-driven researcher pushing the boundaries of knowledge.
Engineer
A problem-solving builder who keeps complex systems running.
Pilot
A skilled flyer who navigates ships through stars and storms.
Hacker
A digital infiltrator who bends computer systems to their will.
Space Captain
A commanding presence who leads a crew through the void.
Smuggler
A risk-taking hauler who moves cargo past the authorities.
Bounty Hunter
A relentless tracker who hunts targets for a price.
Mechanic
A grease-stained fixer who keeps machines alive.
Rebel
A defiant fighter who challenges the powers that be.
Cadet
A young recruit training for service among the stars.
Commander
A decisive officer who makes the calls when it matters most.
Navigator
A course-plotting specialist who charts paths through space.
Scavenger
A resourceful survivor who finds value in what others discard.
Colonist
A pioneer building a new life on an untamed world.
Stowaway
An uninvited passenger hiding in the cargo hold.
Medic
A field healer who patches up crew in the heat of action.
